---
title: "Info"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    css: styles_info.css
---

<div class="secondary-btn-wrapper">
  <a href="/RSVP/RSVP.html" class="secondary-btn">RSVP · AN/ ABMELDUNG</a>
</div>
<div class="secondary-btn-wrapper">
  <a href="/index.html" class="secondary-btn">HOME</a>
  <a href="/info/info.html" class="secondary-btn secondary-btn--active">INFO</a>
</div>

::: small-space
:::

Find all party details below. If you’re missing anything, please contact Nadja (Janneke’s maid of honor) or Dalia (Sereina’s maid of honor), find contacts below.

Jump to a topic:

- [Event Details](#event-details)
- [Location & Transportation](#location)
- [RSVP & Guest Information](#guest-info)
- [Dress Code](#dress-code)
- [Gifts](#gifts-registry)
- [Contact](#contact)

::: medium-space
:::

---

::: {.faq-section}

## Event Details {#event-details}

::: small-space
:::

**Staturday, 29th August 2026**\
Main Event @Chäsalp, Zürich.\
*4pm onwards* Welcome Drinks \
*7pm - 10pm* Dinner \
*10pm - open end* Dancing 

**Friday, 28th August 2026**\
Welcome Drinks @[Grain Pub](https://www.grain.ch/), Zürich Fluntern.\
Join us for a relaxed get-together the evening before!
We’ll meet at the GrainPub on Friday evening from **6pm** for drinks and snacks. Let us know via [RSVP](/RSVP/RSVP.qmd) if you’d like to join.\



:::


::: {.faq-section}

## Location & Transportation {#location}

::: small-space
:::


**Location**\
Chäsalp | Restaurant Alter Tobelhof. 
Tobelhofstrasse 236, 8044 Zürich
[www.chaesalp.ch](https://www.chaesalp.ch)

**How to get there?**

**By Car**: There is free parking available at the venue.
Journey time from Zürich city: *15 min.*\



**By Public Transport**: Check the [SBB Journey Planner](https://www.sbb.ch/de?stops=Z%C3%BCrich+HB_I8503000~Z%C3%BCrich,+Tobelhof_I8591396).
Journey time from Zürich city: *30 min.*\

From Chäsalp to Zurich city center there are connections throughout the night.
We’re also happy to help arrange a taxi or Uber.

::: medium-space
:::

<iframe 
  src="https://www.google.com/maps/embed?pb=!1m18!1m12!1m3!1d2700.547!2d8.587921!3d47.3820486!2m3!1f0!2f0!3f0!3m2!1i1024!2i768!4f13.1!3m3!1m2!1s0x479aa0f272036387%3A0x7729e11af3c7904f!2sCh%C3%A4salp!5e0!3m2!1sen!2sch!4v1234567890" 
  width="100%" 
  height="400" 
  style="border:0;" 
  allowfullscreen="" 
  loading="lazy" 
  referrerpolicy="no-referrer-when-downgrade">
</iframe>

:::

---

::: {.faq-section}

## RSVP & Guest Information {#guest-info}

::: small-space
:::

**When do I need to RSVP by?**\
Please [RSVP](/RSVP/RSVP.qmd) latest by **1st of July, 2026**. This helps us finalize catering numbers and further planning.

**Can I bring a plus-one?**\
We've carefully curated our guest list based on venue capacity. If your invitation includes "and guest" or names a specific person, they are warmly welcomed. If you're unsure, please contact us!

**Are children welcome?**\
We love your little ones, but we've decided to make our wedding an adults-only celebration. 

**What if I have dietary restrictions?**\
Please indicate any dietary restrictions, allergies, or special meal requirements in your [RSVP](/RSVP/RSVP.qmd) form.

:::


---

::: {.faq-section}

## Dress Code {#dress-code}

::: small-space
:::

**What should I wear?**\
Whatever makes you feel "happy and pretty and gaaay"!

Late August in Zürich is usually around 20°C. Maybe bring a light jacket and some
comfy shoes (some uneven walking - maybe even some running).
The venue has indoor and outdoor space, so we’re good whatever the weather.

:::

---

::: {.faq-section}

## Gifts

::: small-space
:::

Having you celebrate with us is what matters most to us — no gifts expected.\ 
For those who would still like to contribute, there will be two options at the celebration: a donation to a charitable organization (tbd) and/or a contribution towards our new bed. 

:::


::: {.faq-section}

## Contact {#contact}

::: small-space
:::

**Nadja** (Janneke’s maid of honor)\
 +41 79 XXX XX XX

**Dalia** (Sereina’s maid of honor)\
+41 79 XXX XX XX
:::
